title: Security Incident Handling Playbook
scenario: Create a comprehensive security incident handling playbook for an organization. The playbook should include steps for initial response, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident activities. The document should be written in a formal tone and be no more than 5 pages in length. Each step should include specific actions and responsible personnel. Assume the organization has a mix of cloud and on-premises infrastructure.
constraints: Use a standard incident response framework
Include at least 10 specific actions and responsible personnel
Use headings and subheadings for clarity

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the playbook adhere to a standard incident response framework?
Are at least 10 specific actions and responsible personnel included?
Does the document use headings and subheadings for clarity?
